mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth indicates expanding corporate earnings potential, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through improved profit expectations.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and labor demand signal robust economic activity, creating positive S&P 500 returns through elevated corporate investment and profit margins.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window for combined INDPRO/PAYEMS signals

mechanism_narrative: High unemployment rate combined with rising wage growth creates inflationary pressure, prompting monetary tightening that reduces S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in < 40% of triggered instances

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% erodes real interest rates, creating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as central banks tighten policy.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with rising consumer spending signals sustained demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 for combined HOUST/RSAFS signals over 3-year window

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates stronger corporate output capacity, creating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through improved earnings visibility.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates combined with rising inflation create uncertainty, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as investors price in policy risks.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in < 40% of triggered instances
